title: Hillary Clinton says she does not recall meeting Epstein as Oversight deposition kicks off
author: Emily Brooks
fullText: Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton told the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee in a deposition on Tuesday that she had no information about the criminal activities of sex offender Jeffrey Epstein and his associate Ghislaine Maxwell, and did not recall ever encountering Epstein. “As I stated in my sworn declaration on January 13,…
summary: Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton told the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee in a deposition on Tuesday that she had no information about the criminal activities of sex offender Jeffrey Epstein and his associate Ghislaine Maxwell, and did not recall ever encountering Epstein. “As I stated in my sworn declaration on January 13,…
